name: BCG vaccine against tuberculosis (Colditz 1994) - odds ratio
citation: Colditz GA, Brewer TF, Berkey CS, et al. JAMA 1994;271(9):698-702. Raw 2x2 as in metafor dat.bcg (Viechtbauer 2010). This fixture exercises the OR pooling path on the same cross-validated raw data as bcg_colditz1994.json (which exercises RR).
data_provenance: metafor dat.bcg; ai=vaccinated TB+, n1=vaccinated total, ci=control TB+, n2=control total.

reference.source: metafor rma(measure='OR', method='REML', data=dat.bcg) - documented output; engine DL reproduces logOR=-0.7474 exactly, PM=-0.7455.

note: OR-path coverage on cross-validated BCG raw data. PM is used by the engine; the published reference uses REML (point estimate agrees to <0.002). Re-verify against a fresh metafor dat.bcg before external citation.
